description: A university CS department's custom auto-grader for student programming assignments at /home/ga/workspace/autograder/ is producing incorrect results. Valid submissions are failing and partial credit is not being awarded. Fix the five specific bugs in the source files: timed-out submissions receiving zero points instead of partial credit, overly strict floating-point comparisons, text matching failures involving trailing spaces, incorrect score percentage calculations for non-perfect scores, and test case parsing errors when the '---' delimiter is present in the expected output. Verify your fixes by running python3 run_grader.py. Do not modify the student submissions or the .testcase files.
